steps.title: Graph the system
steps.content: Enter both equations in Desmos exactly as written. The graphs intersect at $(-12,-47)$, so $x=-12$ and $y=-47$.

steps.title: Subtract the coordinates
steps.content:
The question asks for $x-y$, not either coordinate alone.
$$x-y=-12-(-47)=35$$
The answer is 35.
